title: KAPCO 80L Rubble Bags Heavy Duty Large 25 Pack – Strong Black Rubble Sacks - 400 Guage (100 Micron) | 30KG+ Load | 20” x 30” Builders Refuse Bags for Garden, Construction, DIY, Home – Tear Resistant
features: HEAVY-DUTY PERFORMANCE: These heavy-duty refuse sacks 80L are manufactured with 100-micron thickness to withstand tough loads up to 30kg. Ideal for collecting garden rubble, bricks, soil, or rubbish from construction, DIY, or household clean-up. Extra strong rubble sacks for heavy jobs without tearing or splitting.

STRONG & TEAR RESISTANT: Designed to endure sharp debris and wet waste, our black rubble sacks are built for durability. Made from high-quality recycled material, these strong rubbish bags resist leaks and punctures, making them perfect for builders rubble, garden waste, or heavy domestic garbage.

VERSATILE CLEAN-UP SOLUTION: Whether it's a renovation site, garden, office, or kitchen, these rubble bags are a reliable choice. Use them as refuse sacks, heavy duty garden sacks, or for storing tools and equipment. Their strength and capacity make them great for all kinds of waste sacks usage.

SUSTANIABLE: Our builder bags are made from recycled plastic, helping reduce landfill waste while offering robust performance. These heavy duty plastic sacks give you a sustainable yet strong solution for disposing of building rubble, garden refuse, or household trash.

IDEAL SIZE & PACK: Each sack measures 20 x 30 inches (508mm x 762mm) with a 80-litre capacity, making them perfect heavy duty bags for rubble. Comes in a 25 pack, ideal for home projects or professional jobs. A must-have for anyone seeking extra strong refuse sacks for reliable waste handling.
description: Product Description KAPCO Rubble Bags DIMENSIONS & PACK SIZE Kapco Rubble bags measure 20 x 30in (51 x 76cm) approx. and come in a pack of 25. STRENGTH Our Refuse Sacks are made of 400G (100 Microns) thick recycled plastic making the strong and tear resistant. CAPACITY & USAGE Kapco Bin Liners have a volume of 40 Litres and hold up to 30 kg of waste in Domestic or Commercial applications. REUSED PLASTIC Our bags are made from recycled plastic resulting in reducing plastic waste and helping the environment.
